summary: Tested 4 new features: Adviser Notification Settings, Client Invoicing, Client Portal Onboarding (ID upload, TFN, info updates, Xplan sync), and HNW client data. All backend APIs pass (17/17 tests). Frontend features working correctly. Fixed route conflict between notifications.py and notification_service.py by renaming to /api/adviser-notifications.
critical_code_review_comments: NOTIFICATION SETTINGS API: PASS - GET/PUT /api/adviser-notifications/settings/{adviser_id} working with 10 notification types
NOTIFICATION SETTINGS UI: PASS - 10 toggles grouped by 5 categories (Clients, Investments, Compliance, Documents, Insurance), Save button works
NOTIFICATION SETTINGS SIDEBAR: PASS - Accessible from Tools > Notification Settings in adviser mode (when no client selected)
CLIENT INVOICING API: PASS - POST /api/invoices/, GET /api/invoices/client/{id}, PUT /api/invoices/{id}/status all working
CLIENT INVOICING UI: PASS - Demo invoices visible (INV-202604-A1B2C3 paid $3,630, INV-202604-D4E5F6 sent $1,815), New Invoice form with GST calculation
CLIENT ONBOARDING API: PASS - ID upload, TFN submission (AES-256 encrypted), info updates, Xplan sync (MOCKED)
CLIENT ONBOARDING UI: PASS - Progress bar, Passport/Licence upload buttons, TFN input, phone/email/address fields, Sync to Xplan button
TFN VALIDATION: PASS - 9-digit validation, spaces/dashes accepted, masked output (***-***-789)
HNW DATA: PASS - Thompson NW $9,610,000 (was $1.6M), Chen NW $22,800,000 (was $5.2M) - verified on dashboard
ROUTE FIX: Fixed conflict between /api/notifications/settings (notification_service.py) and adviser notifications by renaming to /api/adviser-notifications
test_credentials: No auth required. Adviser mode: app_mode='adviser', disclaimer_accepted='true'. Client portal: app_mode='personal'.
seed_data_creation: Demo invoices auto-generated by API when no invoices exist for client
context_for_next_testing_agent: New routes: /api/adviser-notifications/settings/{id} (was /api/notifications/settings but conflicted with notification_service.py), /api/invoices/, /api/client-onboarding/*. Key data-testid values: notification-settings, save-notifications, notif-review_due, client-invoicing, create-invoice-btn, submit-invoice-btn, client-onboarding, upload-passport, upload-licence, tfn-input, submit-tfn, sync-xplan-btn, info-phone, info-email, info-address. Notification Settings accessible from sidebar Tools section when no client is selected.

notification_settings_api.details: GET returns default settings with 10 notification types, PUT updates and persists

notification_settings_ui.details: 10 toggles in 5 categories, Save button shows success toast

notification_settings_sidebar.details: Accessible from Tools > Notification Settings in adviser mode (no client selected)

client_invoicing_api.details: Create, list, update status all working with GST calculation

client_invoicing_ui.details: Demo invoices visible, New Invoice form with line items and GST toggle

client_onboarding_api.details: ID upload, TFN (encrypted), info updates, Xplan sync (MOCKED)

client_onboarding_ui.details: Progress bar, upload buttons, TFN input, info fields, Sync button

mocked_apis_list: Xplan sync (client_onboarding.py sync-xplan endpoint returns MOCKED status)

route_fix_applied.issue: Route conflict between /api/notifications/settings in notification_service.py and notifications.py
route_fix_applied.fix: Renamed notifications.py router prefix from /api/notifications to /adviser-notifications
